metadata.description: Required. Unique application/solution name. Drives every resource name. Cap is 15 chars to keep PostgreSQL Flexible Server names within limits.
Optional. Short unique suffix appended to global resource names. Defaults to a 5-char hash of subscription + RG + solution name.

Required. Azure region for non-AI resources (Container Apps, App Service, Functions, Storage, Cosmos/Postgres). Restricted to the 4 regions where ALL three redundancy guarantees hold simultaneously: PostgreSQL Flexible Server ZoneRedundant HA (3 AZs), Cosmos DB automatic failover with paired-region replicas, and Storage GZRS. Independent of azureAiServiceLocation, which selects the model-availability region. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/reliability/regions-list and https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/postgresql/flexible-server/overview#azure-regions
Required. Region for AI Services / Foundry deployments. Restricted to regions with GPT-5.1 GlobalStandard availability.

Required. Selects BOTH the chat-history backend AND the vector index store. cosmosdb: Cosmos DB + Azure AI Search. postgresql: PostgreSQL Flexible Server with pgvector (Azure AI Search is NOT deployed). Locked at deploy time.
Optional. How uploaded documents are picked up for indexing. direct_enqueue enqueues from backend upload flow; event_grid routes blob events through Event Grid.
Optional. Primary chat model deployment name.
Optional. Primary chat model version.
Optional. SKU for the primary chat model deployment.
Optional. Token capacity (thousands of TPM) for the primary chat model.
Optional. Reasoning model deployment name (surfaced via the SSE reasoning channel).
Optional. Reasoning model version.
Optional. SKU for the reasoning model deployment.
Optional. Token capacity for the reasoning model.
Optional. Embedding model deployment name (used by Foundry IQ and the LangGraph indexer).
Optional. Embedding model version.
Optional. SKU for the embedding model deployment.
Optional. Token capacity for the embedding model.
Optional. Azure OpenAI API version exposed via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint (used by the LangGraph orchestrator).
Optional. Azure AI Agent API version (used by the Agent Framework orchestrator).

Optional. Foundry IQ knowledge base name the agent_framework orchestrator grounds on (cosmosdb mode). Must match the name seeded by post_provision.py and resolved through the Project-Search connection.
Optional. Foundry IQ knowledge source name backing the knowledge base (the search-index knowledge source seeded by post_provision.py).
Optional. Foundry IQ knowledge base / knowledge source REST API version (operator-tunable so the KB protocol can advance without a new image).
Optional. Use an existing Azure OpenAI account instead of creating a new one.
Optional. Name of the existing Azure OpenAI account (required if useExistingOpenAi is true).
Optional. Use an existing Azure AI Search service instead of creating a new one.
Optional. Name of the existing Azure AI Search service (required if useExistingSearch is true).
Optional. Use an existing Storage Account instead of creating a new one.
Optional. Name of the existing Storage Account (required if useExistingStorage is true).
Optional. Use an existing Cosmos DB account instead of creating a new one.
Optional. Name of the existing Cosmos DB account (required if useExistingCosmos is true).
Optional. Use an existing Event Grid topic instead of creating a new one.
Optional. Name of the existing Event Grid topic (required if useExistingEventGridTopic is true).
Optional. Existing Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID.
Optional. Tags applied to every deployed resource.
Optional. Identifier of the user creating the deployment, recorded in the resource group tags.
Optional. Object ID of the Entra principal (user/group) to grant Postgres admin access to. Defaults to the deploying principal so the post-provision script can run schema-init via az AAD token.

Required when databaseType=postgresql. Display name (UPN, group name, or app name) of the Entra principal above. Surfaced in pg_hba and used by the post-provision script to log in over AAD. No default: a wrong value silently locks the deployer out of the new server.
Optional. Type of the Entra principal above. Auto-detected from the deployer (User vs ServicePrincipal) when left at the default.

value.env: [union(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference('userAssignedIdentity').outputs.clientId.value), createObject('name', 'AZURE_UAMI_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference('userAssignedIdentity').outputs.clientId.value), createObject('name', 'AZURE_TENANT_ID', 'value', subscription().tenantId), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT', 'value', reference('aiProject').outputs.projectEndpoint.value), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(parameters('useExistingOpenAi'), format('https://{0}.openai.azure.com/', parameters('existingOpenAiName')), reference('aiProject').outputs.endpoint.value)), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION', 'value', parameters('azureOpenAiApiVersion')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_AGENT_API_VERSION', 'value', parameters('azureAiAgentApiVersion')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_GPT_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('gptModelName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_REASONING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('reasoningModelName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('embeddingModelName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_DB_TYPE', 'value', parameters('databaseType')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_INDEX_STORE', 'value', variables('indexStoreValue')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_INGESTION_TRIGGER', 'value', parameters('ingestionTrigger')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_COSMOS_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(parameters('useExistingCosmos'), reference('existingCosmos').documentEndpoint, if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'CosmosDB'), reference('cosmosDb').outputs.endpoint.value, ''))), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_SEARCH_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(parameters('useExistingSearch'), format('https://{0}.search.windows.net', parameters('existingSearchName')), if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'CosmosDB'), reference('aiSearch').outputs.endpoint.value, ''))), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_SEARCH_KNOWLEDGE_BASE_NAME', 'value', parameters('searchKnowledgeBaseName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_SEARCH_KNOWLEDGE_SOURCE_NAME', 'value', parameters('searchKnowledgeSourceName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_SEARCH_KNOWLEDGE_BASE_API_VERSION', 'value', parameters('searchKnowledgeBaseApiVersion')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_POSTGRES_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'PostgreSQL'), format('postgresql://{0}:5432/cwyd?sslmode=require', reference('postgresServer').outputs.serverFqdn.value), '')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_POSTGRES_ADMIN_PRINCIPAL_NAME', 'value', if(equals(parameters('databaseType'), 'PostgreSQL'), parameters('postgresAdminPrincipalName'), '')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SPEECH_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', reference('speechService').outputs.name.value), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SPEECH_SERVICE_REGION', 'value', parameters('azureAiServiceLocation')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SPEECH_ACCOUNT_RESOURCE_ID', 'value', reference('speechService').outputs.resourceId.value), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CONTENT_SAFETY_ENABLED', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CONTENT_SAFETY_ENDPOINT', 'value', reference('cogContentSafety').outputs.endpoint.value), createObject('name', 'ORCHESTRATOR', 'value', 'agent_framework')), if(variables('monitoringEnabled'), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference('applicationInsights').outputs.connectionString.value)), createArray()))]

metadata.description: The name of the function app.
The resource ID of the function app.
The default hostname of the function app.
The principal ID of the system-assigned managed identity.
Solution name suffix used to derive the resource name.
Name of the Event Grid System Topic.
Azure region for the resource.
Tags to apply to the resource.

The type of the event source. E.g., Microsoft.Storage.StorageAccounts.
Event subscriptions to create on the system topic.
Optional. Managed identity configuration for the resource.
Name of the Event Grid System Topic.
Resource ID of the Event Grid System Topic.
System-assigned principal ID (if enabled).
Lower-cased solution suffix used in every downstream resource name.
Resource group containing the deployment.
Location of the non-AI resources (Container Apps, App Service, Functions, Storage, Cosmos/Postgres).
Location of the AI Services account + model deployments (independent of AZURE_LOCATION).
Tenant ID for the deployment subscription.
Client ID of the user-assigned managed identity shared by all v2 workloads.
Principal (object) ID of the user-assigned managed identity.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity.
Selected database engine for chat history + vector index (locked at deploy).
Logical name of the configured vector index store: "AzureSearch" (cosmosdb mode) or "pgvector" (postgresql mode).
Unified AI Services endpoint. Used by both orchestrators (LangGraph via OpenAI-compatible path; Agent Framework via the project endpoint below).

Effective Azure OpenAI endpoint backends call for chat + reasoning + embedding deployments. When `existingOpenAiName` is set this points at the reused v1 OpenAI account; otherwise it equals AZURE_AI_SERVICES_ENDPOINT (deployments live on the v2 Foundry account).
Foundry Project endpoint (https://<account>.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/<project>). Required by the Microsoft Agent Framework SDK.
OpenAI-compatible API version pinned for the GPT + reasoning deployments.
Azure AI Agents API version pinned for the Foundry Project endpoint.
Deployment name of the chat-completions GPT model.
Deployment name of the o-series reasoning model (output flows on the SSE `reasoning` channel).
Deployment name of the embedding model used by the indexing pipeline.
Speech account name (kind=SpeechServices). Backend reads via SpeechSettings.service_name; not used directly by the SDK.
Speech account region. Browser SDK passes this to SpeechConfig.fromAuthorizationToken(token, region) and the backend uses it to build the regional sts/v1.0/issueToken URL.
Speech account ARM resource id. Required as the x-ms-cognitiveservices-resource-id header on the AAD-bearer STS issueToken POST.
Content Safety account endpoint. Backend reads via ContentSafetySettings.endpoint; lifespan gates client construction on this + AZURE_CONTENT_SAFETY_ENABLED.
Content Safety account name (kind=ContentSafety). Diagnostic surface only — backend builds the client from the endpoint.
AI Search service endpoint. Empty in postgresql mode.
AI Search service name. Empty in postgresql mode.
Cosmos DB account endpoint (DocumentEndpoint). Empty in postgresql mode.
Cosmos DB account name. Empty in postgresql mode.
PostgreSQL Flexible Server FQDN (clients add :5432 themselves). Empty in cosmosdb mode.

Full libpq connection URI for the PostgreSQL Flexible Server (no credentials — the workload supplies an Entra token; the user comes from AZURE_UAMI_CLIENT_ID). Mirrors AZURE_COSMOS_ENDPOINT shape so AzurePostgresSettings reads one var. Empty in cosmosdb mode.
PostgreSQL Flexible Server resource name. Empty in cosmosdb mode.
Configured Entra admin principal name for the Postgres Flex server (used as the `user` in AAD-token connections by the post-provision hook). Empty in cosmosdb mode.
Storage account name (shared by RAG document store, indexing queues, and the Function App deployment package).
Primary blob endpoint of the shared storage account (https URL ending in /). Hostname follows the storage cloud-specific suffix.
Container holding documents to be indexed (Event Grid filter + batch_start source).
Storage Queue name fed by Event Grid BlobCreated and consumed by the batch_push Function blueprint.
Public URL of the backend Container App (FastAPI + LangGraph/Agent Framework).
Public URL of the frontend Web App (React/Vite SPA). Backend CORS must allow this origin.
Public URL of the Function App hosting the indexing pipeline.
Function App resource name (used by azd to deploy the function package).
Container Registry login server (e.g. cr<SUFFIX>.azurecr.io). `azd deploy` reads this to discover the push target for backend + function images.
Container Registry resource name. Diagnostic surface only — azd uses the login server above.
Application Insights connection string. Empty when monitoring is disabled.
